jobs.title: Backend Engineer, Domains Registrar
jobs.content: <p>Squarespace builds the all-in-one website-builder + ecommerce / scheduling / domains platform for SMBs worldwide. The Domains Registrar team owns the registrar pipeline that powers Squarespace’s domain product surface.</p><p><strong>The Role:</strong></p><p>The Backend Engineer, Domains Registrar partners with Engineering & Product to ship the registrar core that powers Squarespace’s SMB customer footprint.</p>

jobs.title: Connections & Community Lead
jobs.content: <p>Squarespace is the all-in-one website-builder platform. The People team owns the talent acquisition pipeline across the SMB / ecommerce / domains business units.</p><p><strong>The Role:</strong></p><p>The Connections & Community Lead partners with the People team to grow Squarespace’s talent-community footprint across early-career and mid-career cohorts.</p>
